message:
feat(replay): normalized decision graph model for replay output diffing (ft-og6q6.5.1)

Adds DecisionGraph DAG with DecisionNode, CausalEdge (TriggeredBy/PrecededBy/
OverriddenBy), canonical ordering, L1 equivalence comparison, graph operations
(roots, causal_chain, effects, nodes_by_type), and JSON roundtrip.
33 unit + 20 proptest = 53 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
